packages.name: Candy Land Hunger Games Map
packages.author: JackalopeJack
packages.description: Originally created by MRCHUNKROC, Darkemokitten1, and xXZia18Xx for the Xbox 360. This Hunger Games map has been painstakingly recreated for LCE. It features every single item from the original map. Rather than play a board game, why not fight to the death in one? For the best experience, this map supports up to 8 players. Remember to turn TNT and Fire Spreads off before playing. Enjoy and have fun!

packages.description: Hunger Games - City of Ruins (2013 custom legacy world)

Hunger Games map ported onto Xbox 360 when custom worlds were rare, ported with Horizon and downloaded from MCPEDL

Huge overgrown city with a spawn, nether minecart track to get to the map, redstone activated game start from the huge clock tower.

Issues because of conversion: 1. Nether portal spawns on nether roof

made by Slix Killer, hockeyal5, TheErxinator, ClevelandCavs1, and CentrinoUltra

(Original link to xbox savefile: https://www.planetminecraft.com/project/hunger-games-xbox-city-of-ruins/)

packages.name: Keyboard & Mouse UI
packages.author: SuperCatElvis
packages.description:
A full keyboard and mouse UI replacement for Minecraft: Legacy Console Edition on PC.

Unlike the original Xbox 360 and PS3 versions, where the interface was built entirely around a controller. The PC version introduces a number of inconsistencies. Many actions that were originally mapped to a single controller button are split across multiple keys, which can cause incorrect icons.

This mod aims to restore consistency by replacing controller prompts with accurate keyboard and mouse inputs, using the most commonly used key for each controller action.
packages.extended_description:
# DO NOT USE ON NEOLEGACY
# Original Keyboard tooltips made by NicSonic-_-.

packages.name: SpongeBob SquarePants
packages.author: irv77
packages.description: Bikini Bottom Map ported to Legacy Console Edition
packages.extended_description:
## ![SpongeBob SquarePants DLC](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/LCE-Hub/LCE-Workshop/refs/heads/main/spongebob-squarepants/title.png "advertisement")
Who lives in a pineapple under the sea? Well it's SpongeBob SquarePants, featuring the Bikini Bottom map, and soon included skin pack!—
![Preview Image](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/LCE-Hub/LCE-Workshop/refs/heads/main/spongebob-squarepants/preview.png)

### The Bikini Bottom
- [x] Main Bikini Bottom Map Ported
- [ ] Finish Interiors of Buildings
- [ ] Finalize/Polish Map 

### _Future Skin Pack_
- [ ] _Include Skin Pack Containing Favorite Characters_

### Credits
> Ported/Created By [IRV77](https://irv77.github.io/) & [Vulen Corporation](https://discord.com/invite/xuu8TnSY4b)

packages.name: The Sword of Alzcar
packages.author: fireyvortex2112
packages.description: Challenge / Adventure Map Jan 30th, 2014
packages.extended_description:
Creators of the map

-Slix Killer

-TheErxinator

-ClevelandCavs1

-hockeyal5

-CentrinoUltra

-Heat2179

This map was created on PC by the oxkillerox team and was then converted and finished on Xbox.

RULES:

1-MUST play on peaceful

2-No breaking blocks

3-Sand is used as money

4-Stay on the paths/do not climb out of map

5-Feel free to record a lets play of this map

Original Xbox360 Map (.bin) download- https://www.planetminecraft.com/project/the-sword-of-alzcar/

Converted to LCE with Console2Lce

packages.name: The Truman show Skin pack
packages.author: nookneedsethno-hub
packages.description: Skin pack The Truman Show Volume I (The II skin pack is on progress)
packages.extended_description: The Truman Show is a 1998 American comedy-drama film directed by Peter Weir, written and co-produced by Andrew Niccol. Starring Jim Carrey as Truman Burbank, a man who is unaware that he is living his entire life on a colossal soundstage, and that it is being filmed and broadcast as a reality television show that has a huge international following. All of his friends, family, and members of his community are paid actors whose job is to sustain the illusion and keep Truman unaware that the world he inhabits is scripted and fake.
